mapper.select:
select article.*,user.username from article join user on user.id= article.author_id
author_id = #{authorId}
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR user.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by create_time desc

SELECT * FROM article WHERE id IN
#{id}
